author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit 7dbfbf9. semver job: PR-only gate removed (permanently-skipped in a direct-push repo), --baseline-rev origin/main removed (self-comparison on main), baseline now defaults to highest crates.io version, matrixed over ripsed-core/-fs/-json/ripsed (cli is a binary), continue-on-error removed so findings actually fail CI, fetch-depth:0 dropped (git baseline gone), cache keyed. Validated locally with cargo-semver-checks 0.48: all four crates pass 196 checks against published 0.3.1. This is now a true pre-publish gate — it fails when the tree breaks published API beyond the declared version bump, which pairs with the new verify-then-bump release discipline.
